_comment: DJI codename -> param-table index. Sources: app.paramedit (parameditv5v6) + app.ledgps (ledgpsforcefly) for the 9 DJI models; fcc.apk (com.djifcc.dronecontrol) additionally supplied WA151_LitoX1. Detection order used by those apps: (1) read FC table CRC via DUML cmd_set=0x03 cmd_id=0xE0, match to crc below; (2) fallback probe param NAMES via 0xE1 get_info at sampled indices, pick table with >=2 name matches. Codename/friendly are labels, NOT lookup keys. crc=0 means the source app had no CRC baked in for that model (probe-only). NOTE: WA150 and WA151 share CRC 5f8b2ae1 -- CRC alone cannot separate Mini 5 Pro from Lito X1; disambiguate by count (1557 vs 1593) or by probing the ~12 differing rows.
row_format: TSV per line: index<TAB>type<TAB>default<TAB>min<TAB>max<TAB>name . type 6/8 = float(F32), else little-endian int of size derived from get_info. name may be short|g_config.full.path (pipe-separated).

models.note: target drone; ~12 rows differ from WA150; fswitch_selection idx 146 (vs 138 on WA150)
